title: Creative UI
description: A handful of tools for creative players to manage your worlds, including a gamerule UI and an equipment creator.
body:
## Gamerule Menu
Here, toggle any gamerules and easily set numeric gamerules.
You can also restore a gamerule to its default value.
## Equipment Creator
Simply put any item and start modifying it ! The datapack currently supports:
- Enchantment Management
- Custom Lore
- Custom Model Data
- Stack Size
- Rarity
- Food
## Weather & Daytime
It's the fastest way to set the weather or the time of the day.
